name: Whipped Cream Frosting with Raspberry Sauce (Decadence Ca
recipeInstructions:
Whipped Cream Frosting: Whip the heavy whipping cream with powdered sugar and vanilla (or liqueur) until stiff peaks form. Spread over the top of one layer cake.
Raspberry Sauce: Thaw the frozen raspberries in syrup. To thicken, cook with cornstarch. Chill and serve alongside or on top of the cake with whipped cream.
